pi_items.source: Magento environment setup script creates product with SKU 'LAPTOP-001' named 'Business Laptop Pro' via REST API in setup_magento.sh line 281
Adobe Commerce Frontend Development documentation confirms 1column is a standard Magento 2 page layout value (one of: empty, 1column, 2columns-left, 2columns-right, 3columns)
Multiple sources (StackExchange, GitHub issues) confirm container1 is a valid value for the options_container attribute, corresponding to 'Product Info Column' in Magento 2
Referenced in setup_task.sh line 25 and Magento 2 GitHub repository as a product attribute code for controlling page layout
Referenced in setup_task.sh line 27 and Magento 2 source code as a product attribute code controlling where custom product options are displayed

privileged_info_summary: The task targets product LAPTOP-001 (Business Laptop Pro), a synthetic Magento 2 test product created via REST API. The expected configuration involves setting the page_layout attribute to '1column' and the options_container attribute to 'container1' (Product Info Column). All metadata claims are verified against Magento 2.4.7 core attribute definitions and standard layout values.
